steps.title: Subtract the equations
steps.content:
The question asks for $4x$, so subtract the second equation from the first. The $y$ terms cancel immediately.
$$2x-(-2x)=(9+7y)-(3+7y)$$
$$4x=6$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graphing the two equations gives an intersection with $x=1.5$, and $4(1.5)=6$. The answer is 6.
